description: Both webviews load their content from the local sidecar on :4141 (and the Settings dev server on :1420). Tauri classifies those origins as 'remote' even though they're loopback, so the default capability's `local: true` doesn't apply — and IPC fails with 'Plugin not found' for any custom command. This capability mirrors the default permission set onto those remote URLs so commands like `subscribe_token_usage` and `get_shell_api_key` work from the dashboard and settings webviews.
